chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P No.D-3778 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For katcha peshi. 07-02-2018 Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto A.A.G. Sindh. Syed Meeral Shah Additional Prosecutor General Sindh. Mr. Lutfullah Arain D.A.G. for Pakistan. Mr. Altaf Ahmed Shahid Abro advocate holding brief for Mr. Ali Ahmed Palh advocate for petitioner submits that he has definite instructions from his senior to withdraw this petition as alleged detainee namely Muhammad Uris Hingoro has been recovered and reached to the home safely. Since the alleged detainee has safely reached to his home, therefore, the purpose of filing of instant petition has been served, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
